'''âp-b-zh''' ('''kapabazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunize|immunize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunize|immunize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-b-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kapabazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipabazh|thipabazh]] || [[word:jipabazh|jipabazh]] || [[word:shipabazh|shipabazh]] || [[word:kipabazh|kipabazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupabazh|thuthupabazh]] || [[word:jujupabazh|jujupabazh]] || [[word:shushupabazh|shushupabazh]] || [[word:kukupabazh|kukupabazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupabazh|thupabazh]] || [[word:jupabazh|jupabazh]] || [[word:shupabazh|shupabazh]] || [[word:kupabazh|kupabazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupabazh|thupabazh]] || [[word:jupabazh|jupabazh]] || [[word:shupabazh|shupabazh]] || [[word:kupabazh|kupabazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepabazh|thepabazh]] || [[word:jepabazh|jepabazh]] || [[word:shepabazh|shepabazh]] || [[word:kepabazh|kepabazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopabazh|thothopabazh]] || [[word:jojopabazh|jojopabazh]] || [[word:shoshopabazh|shoshopabazh]] || [[word:kokopabazh|kokopabazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopabazh|thopabazh]] || [[word:jopabazh|jopabazh]] || [[word:shopabazh|shopabazh]] || [[word:kopabazh|kopabazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopabazh|thopabazh]] || [[word:jopabazh|jopabazh]] || [[word:shopabazh|shopabazh]] || [[word:kopabazh|kopabazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpabazh|thĂŠpabazh]] || [[word:jĂŠpabazh|jĂŠpabazh]] || [[word:shĂŠpabazh|shĂŠpabazh]] || [[word:kĂŠpabazh|kĂŠpabazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapabazh|thathapabazh]] || [[word:jajapabazh|jajapabazh]] || [[word:shashapabazh|shashapabazh]] || [[word:kakapabazh|kakapabazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapabazh|thapabazh]] || [[word:japabazh|japabazh]] || [[word:shapabazh|shapabazh]] || [[word:kapabazh|kapabazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapabazh|thapabazh]] || [[word:japabazh|japabazh]] || [[word:shapabazh|shapabazh]] || [[word:kapabazh|kapabazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapabazh|shapabazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapabazh|goshapabazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapabazh|gokishapabazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapabazhnĂŒ|shapabazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapabazhnknĂŒ|goshapabazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapabazhnĂŒ|gokishapabazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapabazhshĂ«|shapabazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkshĂ«|goshapabazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapabazhshĂ«|gokishapabazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapabazhro|shapabazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkro|goshapabazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapabazhro|gokishapabazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapabazhmu|shapabazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkmu|goshapabazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapabazhmu|gokishapabazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapabazhsher|shapabazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapabazhnksher|goshapabazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapabazhsher|gokishapabazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapabazhng|shapabazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkng|goshapabazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapabazhng|gokishapabazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapabazhya|shapabazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkya|goshapabazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapabazhya|gokishapabazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapabazhyam|shapabazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkyam|goshapabazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapabazhyam|gokishapabazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapabazhnĂŒshĂ«|shapabazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapabazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapabazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapabazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapabazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapabazhnĂŒro|shapabazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapabazhnknĂŒro|goshapabazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapabazhnĂŒro|gokishapabazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapabazhnĂŒmu|shapabazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapabazhnknĂŒmu|goshapabazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapabazhnĂŒmu|gokishapabazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapabazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shapabazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapabazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapabazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapabazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapabazhshĂ«ro|shapabazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkshĂ«ro|goshapabazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapabazhshĂ«ro|gokishapabazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapabazhshĂ«mu|shapabazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkshĂ«mu|goshapabazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapabazhshĂ«mu|gokishapabazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapabazhronĂŒ|shapabazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkronĂŒ|goshapabazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapabazhronĂŒ|gokishapabazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapabazhroshĂ«|shapabazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkroshĂ«|goshapabazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapabazhroshĂ«|gokishapabazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapabazhromu|shapabazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkromu|goshapabazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapabazhromu|gokishapabazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapabazhmunĂŒ|shapabazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkmunĂŒ|goshapabazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapabazhmunĂŒ|gokishapabazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapabazhmushĂ«|shapabazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkmushĂ«|goshapabazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapabazhmushĂ«|gokishapabazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapabazhmuro|shapabazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapabazhnkmuro|goshapabazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapabazhmuro|gokishapabazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
